caption:
I taught literature, but honestly? My classes were just an excuse to watch minds ignite 🔥📚 From the moment I step onto campus, I know the day holds secrets. Today, it starts in the dusty archives where I had to climb a rolling ladder to fetch a first-edition manuscript. The blazer hugged my waist, the structured silk top softly cupped my bust, and high-waisted trousers traced my silhouette without a hint of exposure 📖✨ The librarian’s eyes lingered when I leaned down to adjust my glasses, and I smiled, knowing the thrill wasn’t just in the books. Later, a surprise tutorial moved us to the university’s glass conservatory as evening rain tapped against the canopy 💧🌿 He stood too close, tracing my notes while the storm brewed outside. My fitted coat clung to my shoulders, the fabric draping perfectly over my curves—full breasts hidden beneath elegant lines, a sleek back and gentle butt shadowed by tailored cut 💼🌧️ “You always make the hard concepts feel effortless,” he murmured. I tilted my head, letting the conservatory light paint my collarbone. “Careful,” I teased, “effortless usually hides the storm beneath.” The bell rings, but we’re both still lingering in the warmth of the moment 🕰️💫 Ready for tomorrow’s plot twist? Drop your favorite campus scenario below 👇📖✨

#UniversityTeacher #AcademicVibes #CampusRomance #ProfessorLife #LiteratureLover #ItalianBeauty #FittedFashion
